name: deleteBusinessMessages
description: Delete messages on behalf of a business account. Requires the can_delete_sent_messages business bot right to delete messages sent by the bot itself, or the can_delete_all_messages business bot right to delete any message

parameters.name: business_connection_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the business connection on behalf of which to delete the messages

parameters.name: message_ids
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized list of 1-100 identifiers of messages to delete. All messages must be from the same chat. See deleteMessage for limitations on which messages can be deleted.
